name: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Soho Cigar (Tampa)
description_short: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM located at Soho Cigar in Tampa allows customers to buy Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies with cash quickly and safely at 500 South Howard Avenue.
description_long:
CoinFlip operates a network of cryptocurrency ATMs across the United States, with this particular location embedded within Soho Cigar in Tampa's South Howard Avenue area. The company enables consumers to purchase Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies using cash in a self-service kiosk format, positioning itself as a convenient alternative to traditional digital currency exchanges that often require online accounts or bank transfers.

The Soho Cigar location offers Bitcoin and cryptocurrency purchases with cash-only transactions. Customers can sign up for a CoinFlip Account to save time and transact up to $15,000 per day (with limits varying by location). The ATM operates during Soho Cigar's business hours: Friday-Saturday 12:00 PM-11:59 PM, Sunday 12:00 PM-9:00 PM, and Monday-Thursday 12:00 PM-10:00 PM. CoinFlip provides 24/7 customer support via phone and email, and encourages users to download the CoinFlip Crypto Wallet app before transacting.

What distinguishes this location is its integration with an established brick-and-mortar retail partner (Soho Cigar), providing legitimacy and physical accessibility rather than standalone kiosk placement. The company emphasizes security and convenience, requiring no lengthy verification processes compared to traditional exchanges. The availability of pre-transaction wallet setup and account creation demonstrates customer-focused onboarding design.

The primary caveat is that this is a cash-in-only service with transaction limits and likely includes fees (referenced on the website but not specified in detail). Users must have cryptocurrency wallet knowledge or download the app beforehand. The service is not a traditional financial product and involves cryptocurrency volatility risk. Location hours are limited by the host retail business, and this particular ATM is not staffed—all transactions are automated.
pros: Cash-only purchases eliminate need for bank account or debit card
24/7 customer support available by phone (1-877-757-2646) and email
CoinFlip Account feature allows pre-registration to save time and increase daily transaction limits to $15,000
Physical location at established Soho Cigar retail store provides accessibility and legitimacy
CoinFlip Crypto Wallet app available for free download to set up wallet before visiting
Multiple cryptocurrency options beyond Bitcoin (specific coins not listed but referenced as available)
No lengthy online verification process required for same-day cash transactions
cons: Transaction fees are mentioned but specific fee amounts/percentages are not disclosed on the website
Daily transaction limits apply and vary by location (maximum $15,000 with account, lower limits without)
Operating hours limited by host business (Soho Cigar) rather than 24/7 availability, closed until 12:00 PM on most days
Requires cryptocurrency wallet setup in advance—not beginner-friendly for users unfamiliar with crypto wallets
No information provided about which specific cryptocurrencies are supported at this location
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who prefer cash transactions without traditional financial accounts
Cryptocurrency enthusiasts seeking quick cash-to-crypto conversion without online exchange accounts
Individuals in Tampa needing same-day Bitcoin purchases during evening/weekend hours when banks are closed
Repeat customers who create CoinFlip Accounts to maximize daily transaction limits and streamline visits
diagnosis: This Bitcoin ATM is best for cash-holding consumers who want to convert fiat currency to cryptocurrency without opening online exchange accounts or providing banking information. The main caveat is that specific fee structures, supported cryptocurrencies, and exact transaction limits are not disclosed on the location page, requiring customers to contact support for detailed pricing and service information before visiting.
services: Other cryptocurrency purchases with cash (specific coins not detailed)
CoinFlip Account creation for higher transaction limits (up to $15,000/day)
CoinFlip Crypto Wallet app download and setup
Receipt retrieval and transaction history access
Crypto wallet creation prior to transaction
